mapper.select: SELECT ir.*, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_price FROM inspection_request ir LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON ir.medical_technology_id = mt.id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY ir.creation_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_request SET inspection_result = #{inspectionResult}, inspection_employee_id = #{inspectionEmployeeId}, inspection_state = 'COMPLETED' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ir.id, ir.register_id AS registerId, ir.medical_technology_id AS medicalTechnologyId, mt.tech_name AS techName, ir.inspection_info AS inspectionInfo, ir.inspection_position AS inspectionPosition, mt.tech_price AS techPrice, ir.creation_time AS creationTime FROM inspection_request ir INNER JOIN register r ON ir.register_id = r.id LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON ir.medical_technology_id = mt.id WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} AND ir.is_self_booked = 0 AND ir.booked_time IS NULL AND ir.inspection_state = 'CREATED' ORDER BY ir.creation_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_request SET booked_time = #{bookedTime}, inspection_state = 'BOOKED' WHERE id = #{id} AND inspection_state = 'CREATED' AND booked_time IS NULL AND is_self_booked = 0
